name: saulttribe.com/kewadin.com
message: [AI generated] The Sault Tribe of Chippewa Indians owns the Kewadin Casinos. They operate five casinos in Michigan, USA, offering a wide range of gaming options including slot machines, table games, poker, bingo, keno, and more. They also provide amenities like hotels, an RV park, dining venues, and entertainment facilities, making them a complete destination for leisure and entertainment.
